textPlain: Ok this part is prescient:"The parody language INTERCAL was revived as C-INTERCAL, where one literally pleads with the interpreter to run their cryptic code."

The FOC podcast folks released an episode on a paper (they didn't like) on esolangs just today. [0] Their episode on INTERCAL is an all-time classic.I'm also excited for my copy of Temkin's book to arrive![0] https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/lets-take-esoteric-pro...
Reminds be of how people use typescript types like a hidden programming language making calculators etc.
Also linked in the article, https://esolangs.org is worth a read if this is up your alley
This completely reframes coding from a tool to a medium. It's less about computation and more about... encoded philosophy?
hmm, this sounds like a job for vibe coding!
That wiki also comes with a funny CAPTCHA:> Which number does this Befunge code output: 9731231181>\#+:#*9-#\_$.@
